stemHtml: A medium range jet aircraft has its cargo load displaced to a location further aft than on the expected loadsheet. The stabilizer trim setting has not been corrected for this error. What is most likely to happen during take off?

options.a: The stick force increases, and there will be a tendency for the aircraft to over rotate and a possible tail strike
options.b: Stick force is reduced, and there will be a tendency for the aircraft to over rotate and a possible tail strike
options.d: The flight controls are reversed. A push will now be required to overcome the over rotating moment
